reviews.review_text: The Burri Burri Cabin is an absolute delight for a beach holiday. Nestled close to the pristine shoreline, this charming cabin offers the perfect blend of comfort and coastal serenity. From the moment you arrive, the stunning ocean views and gentle sea breeze create an inviting atmosphere that instantly relaxes you. The cabin features modern amenities, a fully equipped kitchen, comfortable bedrooms, and a spacious deck ideal for morning coffees or evening barbecues while watching the waves.Its proximity to the beach means you can stroll down for a swim or sunset walk in minutes. Families, couples, and solo travelers will love the peaceful setting, clean facilities, and thoughtful touches like beach towels and basic supplies provided. The location is convenient yet quiet, away from crowds but near local cafes and shops.We enjoyed unforgettable days exploring the area, with easy access to beautiful walks and clear waters perfect for snorkeling. The cabin’s cozy interior, with its stylish decor and comfortable furnishings, made evenings in equally special. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a memorable, restorative beach escape. Five stars – we’ll be back soon!

We stayed in an ensuite site and paid top dollar. The standard of the ensuite was appalling for the price, compared to other places we stayed. Cheaper and much nicer. The park itself was run down, unsupervised and unpleasant. The permanemt residents opposite us blared gangster rap, followed by their tv volume up so loud which ruined our night. This was our second visit here, which was a mistake. We will not be staying here again.

Charged a premium price for sub-standard facilities.
Park was run down and noisy (permanents).

Not a pleasant stay.

Would not stay here again. Booked a cabin for $250 per night and found black hair all over the bathroom and pubic hairs on the towel. There was no hand soap provided in the bathroom. The cabin was right across from reception, before the boom gate so everyone idle’s right in front of your cabin. It’s largely a permanent caravan park so a lot of concrete. Nice that it’s near the beach but there’s no coming back from someone else’s pubic hair on your bath towel.
Friendly staff. Great location. Love having the ensuite. Would book here again.

Super clean cabins, friendly staff.
Would stay again!
Thank you

I booked 3 nights for an unpowered site and a cabin for family.
I was upgraded to a powered site. The cabin was spotless and well maintained.
The facilities were A1, clean & tidy.
Lots of activities to do free of charge.
An amazing camp kitchen.
Management, friendly and helpful.
Amenities spotless.
Close to the beach and shopping centre.

Run a mile……….then run some more! Zero stars, not one! Do yourself a favor, and don’t stop!

We travelled from Port Douglas to Sydney and stayed in many holiday parks. This was by far the worst. We booked an en-suite powered site for 2 nights and none of it was working - no electricity and no hot water in the en-suite. The facilities themselves were poorly maintained and very dated.
When we reported the issue to reception, they tried to fix it, but didn’t. We used the communal facilities, despite paying for an en-suite, only to find the showers there had no hot water either. Previous reviews have mentioned similar issues.
We decided to check-out one day early and asked for our money back for the night we would not be staying - they refused that, and pretty bluntly too! No apologies for lack of services was given. It was expected that we just accept it! Once again, earlier reviews that management are happy to take money and not provide a proper service seem correct.
The gaming room is a glorified gambling room for kids - nothing is a game, everything is just a kids slot machine. The playground is dilapidated and only suitable for toddlers.
The only benefit to this park is the proximity to the beach, but it’s simply not worth it. If I could give zero stars, I would!
We left this site and moved one hour south, and found a lovely holiday park with all the facilities / amenities that one would expect.
Good

We spent 3 nights there. It was not long enough. Had a fantastic time.
Everything was clean and staff very curtious and friendly.
I have a licenced assistance dog and encountered no problems or issues. In fact very respectiful and accomodating to us both. Quick acess to the beach via 4WD or walking. We will defiantly be back.

Thank you!

They mucked up the booking okay? That happens so when we asked for the beds to be made the rude man threw the sheets on the outside table and walked off forcing us to make bunkbeds we are an older couple. It was difficult. The path 2 beach was closed and of course they don’t inform you as it would be The only reason you would ever stay there, never coming back. The place is a dump anyway.
Close to Anna bay and  Stockton, lots to see and do in and around Anna Bay,
The location was excellent 👌.  Beach was 3 minutes away . Perfect for families with young kids as well.

Would not return as not my sort of stay sorry...
The maintenance man was rude and the entire stay was average. Beach was average as dog poo and sharks . Only good thing was the showers being clean .

An amazing place awesome location great staff 👍 clean comfortable and quiet.
Thanks for an amazing stay

Overnight stay in a cabin, cabin was dated but extremely comfortable. Great location, short stroll to the beach or town for food.
Overnight friends in another cabin had some pretty loud neighbours at a permanent site into the late evening.
Would still recommend.

Anna Bay and coast has a great walking path. Walk for miles and watch whales.
BB holiday park was close to the beach, clean and super friendly hosts. Egg and bacon rolls from the food truck in the morning 😋
We had the unpowered site so no info on rooms.
I actually didn't stay here, sorry... I rented private accommodation which happened to be right next door. It looked pretty average but who can say. I apologise for the confusion.

Reception is just so lovely. I booked a 2 night stay with my dogs. I have extreme anxiety and I'm super nervous about doing this on my own. Reception was so nice to me explaining my situation without any judgement at all and offered to help if I needed anything.
Lovely experience camping with the family. Nearby shops and beach.

I stayed here for 7 days an let me just say, amazing location convenient location, close to shops an beach. The staff and workers there were super friendly they make sure everyone's safe and comfortable, I just want to say a huge thankyou to the owners of the park your legends, keep up the good work, look forward to visiting again🖐

My family has spent a week here and i can honestly the staff are so so friendly. The lovely blonde lady and im assuming her lovely husband are so polite and friendly. They make sure people arent speeding cause of the kids, they are so helpful. Theres a cute community garden for everyone to use and the staff make sure kids are supervised in the pool. I felt extremely safe! Definitley recommend :)
Pleasant surroundings,  clean amenities, and close to the beach.
It is a nice place.
Stayed in our own camper, ensuite site, lovely and clean, walking distance to beach, great cafe there, overall great time, would go back.
Great location

The lady who checked me in was great. Really helpful and nice to talk to. But then at some stage while i was enjoying a swim in the pool some blonde lady who apparently lived upstairs confronted me about not having a wrist band and asked if i was supposed to be there. It made me feel very unwelcome and annoyed as i had just paid good money to stay two nights. This awkward paranioa that i was made to feel continued until i left. It really felt like the owners were happy to take my money but not real keen to make me feel welcome. I would not recommend this place to a friend.

We had an amazing 3 night stay here in a Deluxe Cabin Location was perfect and walking distance to many activities Staff were fabulous, cabins were clean and well equipped (although missing a spatula and chopping board in the kitchen once we asked we had them replaced in 15 mins!) Added bonus we had our own BBQ too Beds were comfortable and came with linen which always a big plus
Beautiful beach right on your doorstep and a park, skate park, toilets, bbqs
Just be aware some of the cheaper cabins do not have bathroom facilities so you need to use the amenities block for toilets and showers but still great value for a few nights  Camp kitchen was set up really well and right next to the pool and small park area There's also free putt putt and table tennis to keep the kids entertained

What a perfect spot for a holiday. The cabins are well supplied with everything you need and the beach is a short stroll down a lovely natural walking track . The beach is like something out of a holiday brochure.  So picturesque.  Just beautiful

We stayed in our caravan and the service location staff were beyond amazing anything U needed any questions they were happy to assist great place to bring your family and relax. Thank you for an amazing stay!

Stayed here for 5 nights with my son who is 6. We arrived the week after Easter. We have just good things to say about the holiday park. The couple who now manage the park is fantastic. They are so service minded and made sure we had a good stay. We spent the first 4 nights in our tent at the powered campsites. It was very convenient located close to the camp kitchen and amenities. The showers and toilets were very clean. There is a clean pool, table tennis and a putt-putt. The beach is a short walk from a side gate and there is a playground and a skatepark right before the beach coming from that direction. Shops close by, just a few minutes by car or an easy walk. The last night we stayed in one of their smaller cabins, just opposite the amenities. It was clean and had everything we needed. It was a cold and rainy day and the manager (she is working in the reception) made sure we were warm and cosy and put a heather in the cabin. Can highly recommend the park for a stay. We were so well looked after by the management couple.
